sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْحَدَّادُ يَصْنَعُ أَدَوَاتٍ مِنَ الْحَدِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Kovač je pravio alate od željeza.
sentences.translationEn: The blacksmith used to make tools from iron.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يُسَخِّنُ الْحَدِيدَ فِي النَّارِ ثُمَّ يَطْرُقُهُ.
sentences.translation: Grijao je željezo u vatri, a potom ga udarao.
sentences.translationEn: He would heat the iron in the fire and then hammer it.

sentences.translation: Napravio je plug za seljaka i ključ za trgovca.
sentences.translationEn: He made a plough for the farmer and a key for the merchant.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ كُلُّ النَّاسِ يَحْتَاجُونَ إِلَى الْحَدَّادِ.
